case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. LEONEL PEREZ RAMIREZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED JUN-03-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, LEONEL PEREZ
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-16-2019 - JUDGMENT.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, LEONEL PEREZ
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, LEONEL PEREZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, LEONEL PEREZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-16-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-16-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOPHIA REYES LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT LEONEL PEREZ RAMIREZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
